features: PLANTIS COMPLEX - Coconut oil, shea butter and avocado extracts form a protective layer on the skin and retain water which ensures the skin remains moisturized and hydrated.
DEEP MOISTURIZING - Our Hydrating Socks soften dry, cracked heels, rough feet, improve calluses, and leave your skin smooth and soft to the touch.
SPA AT HOME - Wear our socks on clean and dry feet, keep them for 20 minutes and relax. Choose the best home Spa foot experience for yourself or for your loved ones as a gift.
HAPPY FEET - Our Hydrating Foot Mask intensely moisturizes, hydrates and refreshes your feet. Get the best results after completing the Plantifique Exfoliating Foot Peel.
UNIVERSAL FIT - Our Hydrating mask softens dry and rough feet for both men and women, and covers most foot sizes (up to size 11 US/ 45 EU).

product_details_tab_data.Title: Plantifique Hydrating Foot Mask Socks – 4 Pairs with Shea Butter for Soft Heels, Deep Moisturizing & Repairing Dry, Rough Skin – Korean Skincare & Foot Care Gift
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Beauty › Skin Care › Hands & Feet › Moisturising Socks
product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: Coconut & Aloe Vera moisturize and nourish your foot skin. Shea Butter leaves your skin smooth and soft to the touch.
product_details_tab_data.Included Components: Shea Butter, Glyceryl Stearate, Avocado Fruit Extract, Spinach Leaf, Broccoli Extract, Sweet Almond Seed, BlueBerry Fruit
product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: Aqua/Water/Eau, Glycerin, Macadamia Ternifolia Seed Oil, Butylene Glycol, Pentaerythrityl Tetraethylhexanoate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Polyglyceryl-3 Methylglucose Distearate, Glyceryl Stearate, Dipropylene Glycol, Stearic Acid, Betaine, Hydroxyacetophenone, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Fruit Extract, Carbomer, Caprylyl Glycol, Arginine, Fragrance/Parfum, Ethylhexylglycerin, Sodium Hyaluronate, Xanthan Gum, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Fruit Juice, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Fruit Water, Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Tocopherol, 1,2-Hexanediol, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Extract, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Fruit Extract.
product_details_tab_data.Active Ingredients: Macadamia Ternifolia Seed Oil, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Fruit Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Fruit Juice, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Fruit Water, Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Tocopherol, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Extract, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Fruit Extract.
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Remove the mask and consult a doctor if your skin becomes red, swollen or itchy. Keep away from the reach of children.
